subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! O My leaf! O aunt of the sacred pavilion of Abhá, cradle of the Most High, present before the Holy Countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی یا ورقتی یا عمه حرم سرادق ابهی مهد علیا امام وجه حاضر و
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement
